# Task: Curate public API, docs, and standalone library smoke test

> Task ID: GROVE-S01-T04
> Sprint: [GROVE-S01](../INDEX.md)
> Status: 📝 draft
> Estimate: M

## Description

Curate grove-core lib.rs into a deliberate public surface: re-export ops, init::provision_project, and the Symbol/Defect/etc. return types, with /// doc comments sufficient for docs.rs. Prove it with a throwaway external crate that depends on grove-core and compiles+runs ops::symbols(...) and init::provision_project(...) — the library smoke test (one of the four backward-compat bars). Nice-to-have: core/README.md and an examples/ program using the issue analyze_project snippet.
